---
title: "Bilan du module"
---

Module Reflection
Throughout this Workflow & Data Management module, I have significantly expanded my technical skill set. Coming from a pure business background, diving into coding and web development was a rewarding challenge.

I learned how to build and structure a professional website using Quarto and successfully deployed it using GitHub Pages. Mastering version control with Git taught me the crucial importance of organized workflows and proper repository management. Furthermore, learning to integrate executable Python code into my projects bridged the gap between raw data analysis and clear, professional presentation.

This module not only improved my technical agility but also proved that a "growth mindset" is essential for adapting to today's data-driven business world.
